title: Graph Representation - Adjacency Matrix
description: How to represent a graph using adjacency matrix in pseudocode
explanation: Adjacency matrix uses a 2D array where adj[i][j] = 1 indicates an edge between vertices i and j. For undirected graphs, the matrix is symmetric. Space complexity: O(V²)

complexity.time: O(1) to add/check edge, O(V²) space

title: Degree Calculation Algorithm
description: Algorithm to calculate degree of each vertex in an undirected graph
code:
// Input: adjacency matrix adj[1..n][1..n]
// Output: array degree[1..n]

FUNCTION CalculateDegrees(n, adj)
 DECLARE degree[1..n]
 
 FOR v = 1 TO n
 deg = 0
 FOR u = 1 TO n
 deg = deg + adj[v][u]
 END FOR
 degree[v] = deg
 END FOR
 
 RETURN degree
END FUNCTION

// Verify Handshaking Lemma
FUNCTION VerifyHandshakingLemma(degree, n)
 sum = 0
 FOR v = 1 TO n
 sum = sum + degree[v]
 END FOR
 
 IF sum MOD 2 == 0 THEN
 RETURN TRUE // Handshaking lemma satisfied
 ELSE
 RETURN FALSE // Invalid graph
 END IF
END FUNCTION
explanation: This algorithm calculates the degree of each vertex by summing the corresponding row in adjacency matrix. The Handshaking Lemma verification ensures sum of degrees is even.

title: Handshaking Lemma Verification
description: Verify if a given degree sequence is valid using Handshaking Lemma
code:
// Check if degree sequence is graphic (can represent a graph)
// Using Handshaking Lemma: sum of degrees must be even

FUNCTION IsValidDegreeSequence(degree[], n)
 sum = 0
 oddCount = 0
 
 FOR i = 1 TO n
 sum = sum + degree[i]
 IF degree[i] MOD 2 == 1 THEN
 oddCount = oddCount + 1
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 // Handshaking Lemma: sum must be even
 IF sum MOD 2 != 0 THEN
 RETURN FALSE
 END IF
 
 // Number of odd degree vertices must be even
 IF oddCount MOD 2 != 0 THEN
 RETURN FALSE
 END IF
 
 // Additional check: max degree < n
 FOR i = 1 TO n
 IF degree[i] >= n THEN
 RETURN FALSE
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN TRUE
END FUNCTION
explanation: This code verifies if a given degree sequence can represent a valid graph using two key properties: sum of degrees is even (equals 2|E|) and number of odd-degree vertices is even.
